author: Varun Grover
summary: This site tells you about 'Messi in India || Standup Comedy by Varun Grover' and explores concepts like aaditi, sharma, messi. Specifically, Love, DEATH and KETCHUP will be touring USA, UK, and Europe in April-June 2026 . When Anant Met Messi. The show is set to be released in April 2018 .
content_chunks: When Anant Met Messi. LOVE, DEATH, and KETCHUP - my brand new show touring USA, UK, and Europe in April-June 2026. Aa jaao!
